observabilityImprovements: Stage start/end UTC and exit-code diagnostics are emitted by release orchestration stages.
Deterministic release-ready summary table is emitted with stage, status, exit code, duration, and command.
Failure diagnostics include failed stage, command, exit code, duration, and artifact/log hint.
Optional summary JSON output is supported through --output-summary-json for profiling workflows.
performanceFindings: Full Engineering Core V1 verification is the dominant runtime stage.
Frontend build stages contribute recurring wall-clock overhead.
Regeneration plus profile fan-out adds substantial cumulative duration.
timeoutRisks: Long full-profile runs can approach CI timeout windows without cached dependencies.
Synchronous child-process execution can appear stalled if a child command blocks without producing output.
remainingLimitations: No forced child-process timeout/termination policy is applied in default release-ready flow to avoid semantic changes.
Summary JSON path management is caller-provided and optional.
Wrapper/tool surface remains broad and is tracked by P8-06 scripts/tools rationalization governance.
nonClaims: No full multi-tenant isolation claim yet.
No global EF query filter claim.
